attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
WSLPA.SO_LINE_PRICE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY, 
WSLPA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
WSLPA.DSCNT_APPLD_AUTOMATICALLY_FLG, 
WSLPA.PRICE_ADJ_CHANGE_REASON_CD, 
WSLPA.BK_PRICE_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD, 
WSLPA.PRICE_ADJ_OPERAND_AMT, 
WSLPA.PRICE_ADJ_APPLICATION_MTHD_CD, 
WSLPA.PRICE_ADJ_APPLIED_FLG, 
WSLPA.SK_PRICE_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT, 
WSLPA.SS_CD, 
WSLPA.DISCOUNT_ROLE, 
WSLPA.EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
WSLPA.EDW_CREATE_USER, 
WSLPA.EDW_UPDATE_DTM, 
WSLPA.EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
WSLPA.RU_BK_DISCOUNT_REQUEST_ID_INT, 
WSLPA.RU_BK_DISCOUNT_REQ_VER_NUM_INT, 
WSLPA.RU_BK_DISCOUNT_ID_INT, 
WSLPA.RU_DSCNT_APLD_POST_TRM_PRD_FLG,
WSLPA.ADJSTD_PER_QTY_DSCNT_USD_AMT,
WSLPA.ADJSTD_USD_AMT ,
WSLPA.LIST_LINE_TYPE_CD,
WSLPA.DSCNT_APPLD_LVL_CD ,
WSLPA.DSCNT_VAL_PER_QTY_AMT ,
WSLPA.DSCNT_PCT ,
WSLPA.DSCNT_MODIFIER_KEY,
WSLPA.PROMOTION_CD,
WSLPA.PROMOTION_TYPE_CD,
WSLPA.CONTEXT_CD,
'N' as SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
WSLPA.SPECIAL_DISCOUNT_DESCR ,
WSLPA.SK_LIST_HEADER_ID_INT,
WSLPA.SK_LIST_LINE_ID_INT,
WSLPA.TIME_BOUND_CRDT_TRM_MTHS_CNT, /*Q1FY21 ANNUITY*/
WSLPA.IS_TIME_BOUND_CRDT_APPLD_FLG /*Q1FY21 ANNUITY*/
,WSLPA.CREDIT_TYPE_NAME
,WSLPA.APPLICABLE_AT_RENEWAL_FLG
,WSLPA.PRICE_ADJ_GROUP_TYPE_NAME
,WSLPA.MNTLY_SUBSCR_PR_ADJ_CR_USD_AMT
,WSLPA.PRICE_ADJ_RECURRENCE_TYPE_CD
,WSLPA.CREDIT_CATEGORY_CD, 
WSLPA.CREDIT_CATEGORY_APPLICABLE_START_DTM, 
WSLPA.DV_CREDIT_CATEGORY_APPLICABLE_START_DT, 
WSLPA.CREDIT_CATEGORY_APPLICABLE_END_DTM, 
WSLPA.DV_CREDIT_CATEGORY_APPLICABLE_END_DT, 
WSLPA.CREDIT_CD,
WSLPA.CHARGE_TYPE_CD,
WSLPA.MNTLY_SUBSCR_CHRG_UPLIFT_LCL_AMT,
WSLPA.START_TV_DTM,
WSLPA.END_TV_DTM
FROM
$$WORKDB.W_SO_LINE_PRICE_ADJUSTMENT_OPL WSLPA
WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SO_LINE_PRICE_ADJUSTMENT_TV  NSLPA
WHERE NSLPA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=WSLPA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  AND WSLPA.START_TV_DTM = NSLPA.START_TV_DTM )
